Name: DuoSecurityCCF
Author: Duo Sentinel CCF (community) - set-your-email@example.com
Description:
The **Cisco Duo Security (CCF)** solution ingests authentication, activity, and telephony logs from the [Duo Admin API v2](https://duo.com/docs/adminapi) into Microsoft Sentinel using the Codeless Connector Framework. Because the Duo Admin API requires per-request HMAC-SHA1 signing (which CCF cannot perform natively), the connector polls a lightweight signing proxy (an Azure Function deployed from this solution's `signing-proxy/`) that signs each request and forwards it to Duo.

**Underlying Microsoft Technologies used:**

This solution depends on the [Codeless Connector Framework (CCF)](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/sentinel/create-codeless-connector) and DCR-based ingestion-time transformations, which may be in Preview and may incur additional ingestion or operational costs.
